commands: bash -c '. $VITE_PLUS_HOME/env && type vp-dev' # should show vp-dev is a shell function
bash -c '. $VITE_PLUS_HOME/env && vp-dev env use -h' # should show help via shell wrapper
bash -c '. $VITE_PLUS_HOME/env && vp-dev env use --help' # should show help via shell wrapper
bash -c '. $VITE_PLUS_HOME/env && vp-dev env use 20.18.0 --no-install && echo VITE_PLUS_NODE_VERSION=$VITE_PLUS_NODE_VERSION' # should set env var via eval
